name: Huevos En Rabo De Mestiza/Poached Eggs in Tom
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Canned whole green chiles, cut into strips
3 ounces Monterey Jack cheese, cut into 8 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large, deep skillet.
2. Add onions and cook until tender but not browned.
3. Place tomatoes in a blender or food processor and blend until chopped but not pureed.
4. Add blended tomatoes and green chiles to the onion mixture and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Add water, salt, sugar, and pepper; cook for another 5 minutes.
6. Break each egg onto a small plate, then carefully slide it into the hot mixture.
7. Place one cheese slice on top of each egg.
8. Cover and gently cook for 5 to 8 minutes, or until eggs are set and cheese is melted.
